name: Dog Food Suppliess
description: SWe need dry food and canned meals for the dogs currently in the shelter.

name: Veterinary Checkup Fund
description: Covers vaccinations, exams, and medication for newly rescued animals.

name: Weekend Dog Walkers
description: We need volunteers to help walk the dogs every Saturday morning.

name: Kennel Maintenance Budget
description: Funds for repairing and repainting the dog kennels.

name: Blankets and Bedding
description: Winter is coming — we need warm blankets for the animals.

name: Adoption Event Funding
description: Helps cover booth setup, banners, and refreshments for adoption drives.

name: Shelter Cleaning Crew
description: Join us for a weekend cleaning day to tidy up the shelter spaces.

name: Animal Toys and Enrichment
description: We’re running low on chew toys, cat trees, and play tunnels.

name: Emergency Rescue Transport Fund
description: Supports gas and vehicle maintenance for emergency animal rescues.
